features: Adidas Ice Dive shower gel with fresh ozonic fragrance cleans face, body and hair thanks to 3-in-1 formula, for a long-lasting fresh feeling all day long
Sporty on the go: the Adidas shower gel and shampoo nourishes the skin, gives the hair softness and revitalises thanks to the Pro Energy Complex after each use. Ideal for the shower in the gym
The unique spicy blend of mint, bergamot and wood is underlined by warm musk and patchouli - the men's shower gel with dynamic fragrance that is full of energy and power!
The shower gel + facial cleansing is pH skin-friendly, has been dermatologically tested and is therefore suitable for all skin types and for daily use. Developed in conjunction with athletes
Box contents: 6 x 250 ml shower gel men by Adidas. The 3-in-1 shower gel for long-lasting freshness. The energy kick for men who want to know
description: Adidas Sport Sensation Ice Dive Shower Gel For all men who start with energy every day and do not go out of the way: every day and after sport. Save time thanks to the special 3-in-1 formulation - the men's shower gel is suitable for face, body and hair. Cleans. It thoroughly, nourishes the skin and provides it with sufficient moisture for the day. The hair remains gentle and supple. With adidas Ice Dive a fresh feeling all day long! Product features: 3-in-1 formulation for body, face and hair. Fragrance notes: mint, lavender, bergamot, musk, patchouli, geranium, ambergris, wood, sandalwood Suitable for all skin types. pH neutral Dermatologically tested. Adidas. The starting point for all doers: what started with founder Adi Dassler, his countless ideas and visions is now a success history. With trainers to accessories, the strong brand stands for confidence, own realisation and the martial spirit. of several generations. Today, the company is committed to young athletes, sustainability and human rights.
